shadow_mode_deltas.reason: Legacy prefix classification would label SKILL001 as managed_blocker, but the authoritative bundle assigns manual_prerequisite_blocker.
Legacy prefix classification would label SESSION002 as managed_blocker, but the authoritative bundle assigns manual_prerequisite_blocker.

ticket_recommendations.title: Android-targeted Godot repo is missing export surfaces or debug APK runnable proof
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-005a by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Emit export_presets.cfg and android/ surfaces at scaffold time. Block RELEASE-001 closeout until debug APK runnable proof exists at the canonical path.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Emit export_presets.cfg and android/ surfaces at scaffold time. Block RELEASE-001 closeout until debug APK runnable proof exists at the canonical path.

ticket_recommendations.title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
ticket_recommendations.summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

ticket_recommendations.title: The supplied session transcript shows repeated retries of the same rejected lifecycle transition
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SESSION002 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: After the same lifecycle blocker repeats, re-run `ticket_lookup`, read `transition_guidance`, load `ticket-execution` if needed, and stop with a blocker instead of retrying the same transition.
ticket_recommendations.summary: After the same lifecycle blocker repeats, re-run `ticket_lookup`, read `transition_guidance`, load `ticket-execution` if needed, and stop with a blocker instead of retrying the same transition.

ticket_recommendations.title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
